title: selaginella mixteca
intro: Selaginella mixteca, also known as Resurrection Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, characterized by its unique ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella mixteca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis and allergies.
